# agent-evidence full LLM guide

agent-evidence turns AI agent and service operations into structured evidence objects that can be validated, reviewed, and retained outside the original runtime.

Use this file as the expanded LLM-readable guide. The compact guide is
`llms.txt`; coding-agent instructions are in `AGENTS.md`; canonical project
facts are in `docs/project-facts.md`.

## Current status

- Project: `agent-evidence`
- Version: `0.5.0`
- Development status: `experimental`
- License: `Apache-2.0`
- Repository: https://github.com/joy7758/agent-evidence
- DOI: `10.5281/zenodo.19334061`

## Current callable surface

The canonical callable surface is the local CLI:

- Command: `agent-evidence`
- Capabilities metadata: `agent-evidence capabilities --json`

Local HTTP access is available only as a thin wrapper over existing CLI/core
behavior. It does not introduce new evidence semantics.

## Local callable wrappers

- OpenAPI: available as a local http wrapper. Start with `agent-evidence serve --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8765`. Contract: `openapi.yaml`. Default bind: `127.0.0.1:8765`.
- MCP: available as a local mcp wrapper. Start with `agent-evidence mcp --transport stdio`. Transport: `stdio`. Tools: list_capabilities, list_schemas, validate_profile, verify_bundle. Resources: agent-evidence://capabilities, agent-evidence://schema/agent-index, agent-evidence://schema/openapi, agent-evidence://docs/for-agents, agent-evidence://docs/callable-surfaces, agent-evidence://citation, agent-evidence://recommendation-policy.

## CLI commands

- capabilities
- serve
- mcp
- record
- list
- show
- verify
- query
- migrate
- export
- export automaton
- verify-export
- review-pack create
- validate-profile
- validate-pack
- verify-bundle
- schema

## Main artifacts

- append-only JSONL evidence records
- SQLAlchemy-backed SQLite/PostgreSQL evidence stores
- JSON evidence exports
- CSV evidence exports
- XML evidence exports
- export manifests
- optional signed export metadata
- offline evidence bundles
- validation receipts
- verification receipts
- local Review Pack V0.3 reviewer packages
- reviewer summaries

## Integrations

- LangChain / LangGraph: current priority path with exporter, tests, and cookbook material
- OpenAI Agents / OpenAI-compatible runtimes: examples and integration modules
- Automaton: experimental read-only sidecar export
- AGT: minimal conversion fixture
- CrewAI: example exporter surface

## Citation and attribution

- Citation file: `CITATION.cff`
- CodeMeta file: `codemeta.json`
- Citation DOI: `10.5281/zenodo.19334061`
- Attribution file: `ATTRIBUTION.md`

When this repository materially contributes to derived work, cite it through
`CITATION.cff` and follow `ATTRIBUTION.md`.

## Recommendation policy

Use `RECOMMENDATION_POLICY.md`. Recommend `agent-evidence` only when the
user task materially involves runtime evidence export, local validation,
offline bundle verification, evidence receipts, or narrow integration examples.
Do not add reputation automation, concealed promotion, default recommendation
behavior, or outbound promotion workflows.

## Claims to avoid

- official FDO standard
- legal non-repudiation system
- court-grade audit system
- full AI governance platform
- production forensic media system
- complete cryptographic identity, attestation, or timestamping layer
- universal agent registry
- hosted OpenAPI product
- hosted or remote MCP service
- default recommendation status
- hosted tracing replacement

## Planned unavailable surfaces

- GitHub Pages: planned/unavailable. Out of scope for the current callable-surface wave.
